en: We just wanted them to know we do more than comedy. Oh, that was my line.
ko: 우리는 그들에게 코미디만 하는 게 아니라는 걸 알리고 싶었습니다.

en: Well, I guess it's mine now, son! How would you know?
ko: 음, 이제 내 차례인 것 같군, 아들!

en: You were always gone when I was a kid! See? Acting.
ko: 내가 어렸을 때 항상 자리를 비웠잖아! 봐, 연기야. 오 마이 갓.

en: There you go. Oh, my god. I just soiled myself.
The Academy said they didn't have enough money for an opening number.
ko: 아카데미에서 오프닝 넘버를 위한 예산이 부족하다고 했어.

en: I'm going to do one anyway.
Before we move on, I want to make a quick program note about acceptance speeches.
ko: 진행하기 전에 수상 소감에 대한 간단한 공지를 하고 싶어요.

en: As always, the producers are incredibly concerned with them running long.
ko: 항상 그렇듯이, 제작자들은 소감이 길어지는 것에 대해 매우 걱정하고 있습니다.

en: It's not that we don't have time for long speeches.
It's that we don't have time for boring speeches. I just want to thank everybody I've ever met in my entire life.
Good lord! Did I really earn this, or did I just wear you all down?
ko: 내가 정말 이걸 받을 자격이 있는 건가, 아니면 여러분을 지치게 한 건가?

en: Well, I'll just say what's in my heart. Ba-bump, ba-bump.
ko: 음, 내 마음속에 있는 걸 말할게요.
